name: io.github.sandovalrr/project-context
title: Project Context
description: Safely manage repository-scoped issues across Linear, GitHub Issues, and Jira Cloud.

environmentVariables.name: PROJECT_CONTEXT_CONFIG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to the host-local configuration directory

environmentVariables.name: PROJECT_CONTEXT_STATE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to the host-local runtime state directory

environmentVariables.name: PROJECT_CONTEXT_CWD
environmentVariables.description: Optional repository fallback when the MCP client provides no filesystem root
